product: A10 (A10 Wide / A10 Focus) — passive medium-throw line source. L-Acoustics groups all A10 documentation under "A10 Wide" in the Documentation Center; Wide and Focus are dispersion variants of the same enclosure and share one document set.

electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: Wide: 67 Hz - 20 kHz; Focus: 66 Hz - 20 kHz (usable bandwidth, -10 dB, [A10] preset)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4. A10 Wide reaches 137 dB; A10 Focus reaches 140 dB (value shown).
electroacoustic.directivity: Enclosure coverage 10° (Focus) or 30° (Wide); HF Panflex waveguide adjustable to 70° or 110° symmetric, or 90° asymmetric (L/R or up/down)
electroacoustic.components: LF: 1x 10" neodymium cone driver (bass-reflex, L-Vents); HF: 1x 2.5" diaphragm neodymium compression driver on DOSC waveguide with Panflex

operating_modes: passive (single amplifier channel drives the full enclosure via one preset)

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), interchangeable IN/LINK; internal pinout uses points 1+/1- for the transducer, points 2+/2- not linked
connection.breakouts: Optional accessories: 4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON with CC4FP adapter; 8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON

physical.weight_note: A10 Wide: 20 kg / 44 lb; A10 Focus: 22 kg / 49 lb (net)
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic beech and birch plywood, bent-wood construction; coated steel grille with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; finish Pantone 426 C dark grey brown

deployment.max_per_flown_array: Vertical array: up to 8 with A10-BUMP (up to 4 with A10-RIGBAR); radial array: up to 9 with 3x A10-LIFT; safe/maximum limits depend on Soundvision-verified deployment geometry
deployment.inter_element_angles: Adjustable site angles via 13-16 pickup points per side; A-TILT stacking accessory opening angle 12.5°-25°; pole-mount A-MOUNT site angle 0°, -5° or -15°
rigging_accessories: A-TILT (site-angle element for stacking A10 onto KS21)

usage: Medium-throw passive line source for production audio up to about 35 m; choose A10 Focus (10° enclosure) for tight, longer projection or A10 Wide (30° enclosure) for broad coverage with preserved sightlines.

Drive each enclosure on one amplifier channel: LA4X gives one A10 per output (max 8 per amp) for full Autosolver optimization, while LA12X can power up to three per output (max 12) to cut cabling at the cost of per-box tuning.

Use the single [A10] preset for all main-PA arrays regardless of Wide/Focus mix or Panflex setting; switch to [A10_FI] for short-throw front fill/delay and [A10_MO] for stage monitoring (a low-latency monitor variant trims latency for live wedge use).
Pair with KS21 subwoofers via [KS21_100] to extend bandwidth down to roughly 31 Hz; one KS21 per two A10 reinforces the LF contour, one KS21 per single A10 adds about 2 dB more.
Tailor HF coverage in the field with Panflex L-Fins (70°, 110°, or 90° asymmetric) without changing the preset, adapting horizontal spread to the audience without re-tuning.

Deploy as a flown vertical array (up to 8 on A10-BUMP), a radial/horizontal array on A10-LIFT, ground-stacked on KS21 with A-TILT, or as a single pole-mounted point source; IP55 rating supports outdoor shows, and all array sizes must be validated in Soundvision for safety factor.
